command:
#!/bin/bash
export PATH=/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH
set +e
echo '========================================'
echo 'COMPREHENSIVE FIX — ALL REMAINING ISSUES'
echo '========================================'

# --- 1. Find and verify UFW ---
echo '--- 1. UFW investigation ---'
which ufw 2>/dev/null || find / -name 'ufw' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5
dpkg -l | grep ufw 2>/dev/null
/usr/sbin/ufw status 2>/dev/null || echo 'UFW binary at /usr/sbin/ufw not found'

#
intent: Comprehensive fix: reinstall UFW, fix control-bridge, re-apply iptables, persist rules
